sections.thesis: KV-cache fragmentation caps achievable batch size at long context, which is the binding constraint on serving cost for every long-context product. Tensorpage applies OS paging to the cache and reports a 2.3x batch-size increase at 128k context for 1.7% throughput overhead [vb-tensorpage#8], with the harness public and reproducible from one make target [vb-tensorpage#9].
sections.founder: Eighteen months on one artifact, with no pivot and no second project [vb-tensorpage#0 through vb-tensorpage#14]. Two behaviours carry most of the founder score. First, correction under public criticism: challenged on a hard-coded block size, the founder made it configurable within the hour and said the default was a benchmark artifact rather than a belief [vb-tensorpage#4]. Second, self-correction against their own headline number - they published that v0.1 had overstated the win by 18% because the baseline was unbatched, with the corrected table [vb-tensorpage#10]. Founders who publish their own overstatement are rare and the score weights it accordingly.
sections.market: Inference-serving infrastructure. Adoption is developer-led: 148 dependent repositories at the v0.5.0 tag [vb-tensorpage#14] and two named production users on the quota path [vb-tensorpage#12]. GAP: no revenue, no pricing, no commercial model stated anywhere.
risks: The core technique is publishable and published. A serving framework can absorb it, and one probably will.
Open-source adoption with no pricing model. 148 dependents is distribution, not a business, and the team has not said what they would charge for.
Two people. The disaggregated-prefill direction is a substantially larger engineering surface than the allocator was.
Market axis confidence is 0.61 against a founder axis confidence of 0.88. We know much more about how they build than about who pays.
gaps_flagged: No revenue verification attempted - no revenue is claimed.
Two production users are named by the team and were not independently confirmed.
No pricing or commercial model exists to evaluate.
Score trajectory was recomputed at six as_of dates; every point uses only events observed on or before that date.
sections.recommendation: PROCEED. Strongest founder evidence in the set, with a tightening confidence band across six replayed as_of dates. Take the meeting on the commercial question, since the technical question is effectively answered by the public record.

recommendation: PROCEED. Strongest founder evidence in the set, band tightening across six replayed as_of dates. Take the meeting on the commercial question.
